parameters: The boat I was on was currently proceeding toward the floating island
paradise of the south, known far and wide as a romantic resort.
I took out my tablet to confirm my location with the map app.
I thought I'd be able to see it by now.
I squinted my eyes and caught the faint outline of an island ahead.
The closer we got, the clearer it became.
It's been five years since I last sailed to this island, huh? I never thought
I'd be coming back for a reason like this.
I muttered to myself as I gazed at the island.
Five years ago, my parents moved to the big city for their jobs.
My childhood friend, who was almost done with school now, called me
The island was filled with leisure facilities, offering picturesque beaches,
marine sports, hot springs, and other water attractions.
On top of that, it was famous in other circles too.
Mainly for its nude beaches, health spas, love hotels, and
Thanks to its twofold splendor, the island was a major
However, tourism had majorly declined since I left.
According to my childhood friend, the cause was a new phenomenon
A few months ago the island was full of tourists, but after a certain day,
people began collapsing one after another.
Since nobody could figure out the specific reason, people eventually
My childhood friend's solution was to ask me to come back as a transfer
As we landed, nostalgic scenery spread out before my eyes.
We played around here all the time as kids.
A single girl greeted me in the harbor.
She was the childhood friend I grew up together with.
The moment she caught sight of me, her face lit up and she ran over.
I haven't seen you in forever! How've you been?

She grabbed my hand and shook it vigorously. She was as cheerful as
ever, and I felt the same joy at our reunion.
We were neighbors as kids, so we played together a lot.
Glad to hear it! Here I thought you might've forgotten me.
Don't be silly. How could I forget anyone as loud as you?
When I teased her, she puffed her cheeks, pretending to be mad.
I couldn't help laughing at the sight.
skit ゆっくり首振る mikoto t
She punched my shoulder weakly enough that it didn't even hurt.
By the way, are you still helping out at your parents' shrine?

She came from a long and storied line.
She was raised to be a great shrine maiden, and she'd lived up to
Incidentally, her parents were priests who managed the shrine they
Mikoto dealt with a lot of the pilgrims.
Her face looked a little sad.
We haven't been getting many visitors recently because of the incidents.
People's vigor being sucked away affected her too.
I looked down to ponder it, but she interrupted me, cheerful
Enough of that now! We've gotta go to school or we'll be late!
